revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} An inline formatting template primarily meant to handle the linewrapping of groupnames in {{tl|Navbox}}es or relatively long entries in infoboxes and sidebars. It reduces the padding between the text and the edge of the cell, minimizing the height of the group parameter. == Parameters == * {{para|1}} - The item, i.e. the text to display * {{para|style}} - Additional [[:en:CSS|CSS]] code for styling == Tracking categories == * {{Category link with count|Pages using Template:Longitem with unnamed style parameter}} == See also == * {{tl|longlink}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline templates]] [[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} An inline formatting template primarily meant to handle the linewrapping of groupnames in {{tl|Navbox}}es or relatively long entries in infoboxes and sidebars. It reduces the padding between the text and the edge of the cell, minimizing the height of the group parameter. == Parameters == * {{para|1}} - The item, i.e. the text to display * {{para|style}} - Additional [[:en:CSS|CSS]] code for styling == Tracking categories == * {{Category link with count|Pages using Template:Longitem with unnamed style parameter}} == See also == * {{tl|longlink}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Inline templates]] [[Category:Text-specific formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
